name: Alma Park Tennis Courts
description: Alma Park Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in Alma, AR. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: City Heights United Methodist Church
description: Come play pickleball at City Heights United Methodist Church in Van Buren, AR! There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: City Park Van Buren
description: City Park Van Buren is a place to play pickleball in Van Buren, AR. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Mulberry City Park
description: Come play pickleball at Mulberry City Park in Mulberry, AR! There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Van Zandt Park
description: Van Zandt Park is a place to play pickleball in Van Buren, AR. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.
